abilities.description: Jump to a tile within range 2. Damage both yourself and units you land on equal to 25% of your current HP.Upgraded: Jump to a tile within range 2. Damage both yourself and units you land on equal to 25% of your current HP. This attack inflicts Bruise and has a chance to Stun.

abilities.description: Target any tile. At the beginning of your next turn, jump to that tile. If you land on a unit, stun it. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Target any tile. At the beginning of your next turn, jump to that tile. If you land on a unit, damage and stun it. (This spell costs less.) (Castable once per turn.)

[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]

[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]
[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]

abilities.description: A melee attack with Life Steal. If used on an ally, gain +1 Strength. If used on a pickup, gain double that pickup's effects.Upgraded: A wide melee attack with Life Steal. If used on an ally, gain +1 Strength. If used on a pickup, gain double that pickup's effects.
